subject: docs(audit): rewrite all outdated documentation to match actuals-first codebase
body:
After the actuals-first pivot (Session 2), nearly all documentation still described
the old 3-tab UI, expense CRUD, and 4-step import wizard. This commit brings every
doc and user-facing string in sync with the current single-screen dashboard, 3-step
import wizard, and unified Transaction model.

- README.md: Full rewrite — project structure, features, tech stack all corrected
- USER_GUIDE.md: Full rewrite — dashboard, import, patterns workflow replaces old tabs
- TESTING_GUIDE.md: Full rewrite — all test scenarios match current UI elements
- TutorialModal.vue: 6 steps updated for import→patterns→forecast→runway flow
- WorkspaceDetailView/ListView: "expenses" → "transactions/patterns" in confirm dialogs
- useFormat.ts, useFormValidation.ts, useTagAutocomplete.ts: stale code comments fixed
- HISTORY.md: Corrected "legacy types retained" → "removed" after clean slate migration
- SESSION_NOTES.md: Updated to reflect documentation audit session

Tags: docs, ux, cleanup, audit
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: docs-audit
Semver: patch

title: rewrite all outdated documentation to match actuals-first codebase
